global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with a clear promotional message about food delivery.
global.main_message: Promoting food delivery with a special discount.

elements.label: purple background
elements.description: A solid purple background that fills the entire banner, providing a vibrant and eye-catching base.

elements.label: BiteRush logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring the text 'BiteRush' in a modern font, positioned at the top of the banner.

elements.label: two mirrors icon
elements.description: An icon depicting two stylized mirrors, outlined in a light color, centered within the banner.

elements.label: additional icon
elements.description: A small decorative icon, possibly representing food or dining, located slightly below the center of the banner.

elements.label: main message text
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Hungry? We got you Fresh favorites nearby 30% Order now', prominently displayed at the bottom of the banner.
elements.text_content: Hungry? We got you Fresh favorites nearby 30% Order now

elements.label: sale announcement
elements.description: A bright yellow text reading 'SALE', positioned at the top right corner of the banner to attract attention.

elements.label: 30% discount badge
elements.description: A bold, red text indicating a 30% discount, placed at the bottom of the banner to emphasize the offer.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by decorative elements, with the main message and CTA at the bottom.
